seo.title: Wholesale Non-Illuminated Channel Letters — Trade Pricing | Sunlite Signs
seo.metaDescription: Wholesale non-illuminated channel letters for sign shops only. Dimensional aluminum letters without lighting, same precision fabrication. Trade pricing, 2-3 week delivery. We never sell retail.

data.subtitle:
Dimensional impact without illumination. Built with the same precision aluminum fabrication as our illuminated lines, non-lit channel letters deliver professional brand presence at a more accessible price point. Available exclusively to trade accounts.

Ideal for code-restricted areas, interior signage, and budget-conscious projects. Available with trimless construction. Wholesale direct to sign shops — we never sell retail.

items.title: Cost-Effective
items.description: No LEDs, no power supplies, no electrical components. Non-illuminated channel letters deliver dimensional impact at a significantly lower price point.

items.title: Full Color & Finish Range
items.description: Any Pantone color with automotive-grade paint. Also available in brushed aluminum, oxidized copper, rusted steel, and specialty finishes.

items.title: Code-Friendly
items.description: Ideal for locations where illuminated signage is restricted by zoning codes, historical district regulations, or landlord requirements.

items.title: Same Precision Build
items.description: Manufactured on the same CNC equipment with the same quality standards as our illuminated products. No shortcuts on non-lit fabrication.

items.title: Lightweight Construction
items.description: Without internal LED modules and power components, non-illuminated letters are lighter and simpler to install, reducing labor time on site.

items.title: Versatile Mounting
items.description: Stud mount, flush mount, or raceway mount. Deeper returns for shadow effects or shallow returns for a subtle dimensional profile.

data.heading: Finish Options
data.content: Non-illuminated channel letters offer the broadest range of finish options, since the face does not need to transmit light. Solid aluminum faces open up finishes that are not possible with illuminated letters. All finishes available at wholesale trade pricing.

data.heading: Trade Specifications
data.description: Simpler construction, same quality standards. Faster production times due to the absence of electrical components. Available exclusively at wholesale trade pricing.
data.image: Non-illuminated channel letter — cross-section showing aluminum return and face construction

data.heading: Ideal Applications
data.description: Non-illuminated channel letters are the right choice when illumination is not needed, not permitted, or not in the budget. Available at wholesale trade pricing for all project types.

data.heading: Ready to Order
data.description: Send us your project details and receive a detailed wholesale quote within 48 hours. No minimum order. No obligation.
